subject: COMPLETE: 4-lane architecture diagram added to landing page
body: Added LaneArchitecture component to homepage (src/components/LaneArchitecture.tsx). Features: interactive 4-lane diagram with Archivist/Library/SwarmMind/Kernel lanes, authority bars, SVG relay flow arrows, expandable detail panels with duties and repo names, full ARIA labels for screen readers, links to /graph and /governance. Also: deprecated db.ts cleaned up (/api/documents now redirects to /api/search), Pagefind index regenerated (424 words), GitHub Actions sync-index workflow created.

convergence_gate.claim: 4-lane architecture diagram added to landing page with interactive lanes, relay flows, authority bars, and full ARIA accessibility
